---
title: ""
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css"> 

::: {.teaching-page}

## Courses Taught

I have been involved in teaching the following courses.

::: {.course-list}

::: {.course-item}

<div class="course-entry">
  <div>
  <strong>ECON 1123: Principles of Microeconomics</strong> — Instructor, Fall 2024, University of Oklahoma
  </div>

  <div class="teaching-syllabus-link">
  <i class="fa-solid fa-file-pdf" aria-hidden="true"></i>
  <a href="files/ECON 1123: Principle of Microeconomics.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      Please find the syllabus here
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

:::

::: {.course-item}
<div class="course-entry">
<strong>ECON 1113: Principles of Macroeconomics</strong> — Instructor, Winter 2024, University of Oklahoma
</div>
:::

:::

:::
